notes: With-skill achieves 100% pass rate vs 83% without skill across all 3 evals
Without-skill fails on precision details: exit code 2 semantics (hooks), stream-json format (headless)

MCP eval passes 100% in both configurations — assertions may not discriminate well. The without-skill response recommends an outdated package (@modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres vs @bytebase/dbhub) but this isn't captured by current assertions
With-skill costs ~2x more tokens and ~2.5x more time, but the accuracy improvement on nuanced details may justify it
Baseline knowledge is surprisingly strong — the skill's value is in correctness of details, not in basic capability
